children.text: First let's configure myPill according to your needs.
When would you like to be reminded?
When would you like to be reminded?
Would you like to be reminded until you take your pill? (snooze)
With these features, we'll make sure you'll NEVER miss a pill -
Use any combination of active pills: 21/7, 24/4, 84/7, etc.
We'll keep nagging you until you take your pill.
Choose a custom sound for the reminder alarm.
Makes sure no one sees your private information.
Ring & patch contraceptives, extra pill pack themes.
Changing the reminder message to something only you would understand.
Keeps track of the time you took the pill every day.
Have more reminders without having to open myPill.
